title: Section 16
content: No person who has directly or indirectly, by himself or his partner or agent, any share or interest in any contract, by or on behalf of a Corporation, or in any other road transport undertaking shall become or remain an 1[officer or other employee] of the Corporation.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 16 and the Schedule, ibid., for "officer or servant" (w.e.f. 13-11-1982).
